rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §263.0025 governs special education decision-making for foster children. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 263.0025. SPECIAL EDUCATION DECISION-MAKING FOR CHILDREN IN FOSTER CARE.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
